items.title: SK Hynix stock opens at $170 on Nasdaq, as trillion-dollar chip company welcomes U.S. investors

items.title: Trump says he won't sign housing bill, which would become law automatically

items.title: Stablecoin issuer Circle just got the greenlight to operate as a bank. The shares are up 5%
items.summary: Stablecoin issuer Circle surged in premarket trading after the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency granted it approval to operate as a trust bank.

items.title: Trump says U.S. to continue talks with Iran despite scrapped ceasefire
items.summary: The ceasefire signed last month came under serious strain in recent days as the U.S. and Iranian forces exchanged attacks for consecutive days this week.

items.title: Meta found to breach EU laws with 'addictive' Instagram, Facebook designs

items.title: Private chef salaries reach $300,000 as the rich seek their own Michelin stars
items.summary: Demand for chefs, personal assistants, butlers, nannies, housekeepers, chauffeurs and estate managers have reached records, according to Morgan & Mallet.

items.title: 48-year-old worked at a garden center for $17/hour to make ends meet: 'It's one of the best jobs I've ever had'
items.summary: "Without a job, I felt invisible. With a job, I felt seen, useful, and purposeful again," says Leslie Friday, who sold plants and flowers while job searching after a layoff. "I loved every minute."

items.title: Why the stock market and economy may seem out of sync
